query:
SELECT 
  q.sectionId,
  s.title as sectionTitle,
  COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) as totalQuestions,
  COUNT(DISTINCT r.questionId) as answeredQuestions
FROM questions q
LEFT JOIN responses r ON q.id = r.questionId 
  AND r.organizationId = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'radone-munson')
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT 'A' as id, 'Organization Information' as title
  UNION SELECT 'B', 'Overview & Architecture'
  UNION SELECT 'C', 'Data & Integration'
  UNION SELECT 'D', 'Configuration Files'
  UNION SELECT 'E', 'Connectivity'
  UNION SELECT 'F', 'DICOM Data Validation'
) s ON q.sectionId = s.id
GROUP BY q.sectionId, s.title
ORDER BY q.sectionId;
